title: gilia angelensis
intro: Gilia angelensis, also known as Angel's Gilia, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the Polemoniaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Gilia angelensis include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Gilia angelensis can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
